title: Gorilla Waterproof Patch & Seal Tape Black 3m
features: 100% WATERPROOF - Forms a permanent bond which is 100% waterproof and airtight. Perfect for patching holes, cracks, gaps and tears.
WORKS IN EXTREME CONDITIONS - Waterproof Patch and Seal Tape withstands wet, dry, hot or cold conditions.
UV RESISTANT - The UV resistant backing won't be affected by direct sunlight.
FLEX AND STRETCH - The rubberised backing can be flexed and stretched to adapt to uneven surfaces.
GREAT FOR Window frames, conservatories, inflatables, pond covers, gutters, pipes, roofing and more!

APPLICATION PREPARE For best results, apply the tape to a clean surface at room temperature. CUT Keep liner on tape and cut tape to desired size. Tape size should be larger than the repair area. POSITION Remove the release liner and place tape over the repair area. Tape cannot be repositioned once applied. PRESS Rub firmly across entire surface of tape to secure it to the repair area. *May not adhere to silicone or water-repellent materials.
NOT FOR USE Not for use on seams, applications under pressure, or automotive applications relating to the engine.
STORAGE Store tape on the top and bottom disc at room temperature. Edges of tape may be sticky.
